sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80685" key="pentamoiriai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντα-μοιριαῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n80685.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of five degrees</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">διαστήματα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:6:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.9</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
